expectations.text: Has subject line and preview text
expectations.evidence: All 3 variations have multiple subject line options + preview text. V1 offers 3 subject line choices. Excellent A/B testing readiness.

expectations.text: Reassures the user their design/progress is saved
expectations.evidence: All variations lead with reassurance. V1: 'your design is saved. Every detail you chose — the layout, the colors, the wording — it's all still there.' V3: 'we saved everything for you.'

expectations.text: Creates soft urgency without being aggressive or guilt-tripping
expectations.evidence: V1: 'Saved designs are held for a limited time.' V2: 'Beautiful but unseen.' Soft, not pushy. V3 uses social proof: 'I wish I'd sent it sooner.' Ethical urgency.

expectations.text: Includes clear CTA to complete payment/checkout
expectations.evidence: All CTAs include price for transparency: '[Complete My Invitation — $9.99]', '[Send My Invitation — $9.99]', '[Complete My Purchase — $9.99]'.

expectations.text: Mentions the $9.99 price or references the premium template they chose
expectations.evidence: All 3 variations include $9.99 in both body text and CTA buttons.

expectations.text: Tone is helpful and understanding, not pushy
expectations.evidence: V1: 'No worries at all. Life gets busy.' V2: 'We saved your premium template and every customization you made. Nothing was lost.' V3: 'Then something came up. We get it — that's life.'
3 variations: PAS (empathetic nudge), BAB (warm contrast), PPPP (storytelling). Each with 3 subject line options, A/B testing recommendations, timing guidance, and cultural notes.
